subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Thy letter was received and the trials, afflictions and calamities that have befallen thee became known [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی نامه شما رسید و بلایا و محن و رزایای وارده معلوم گردید عشق زاول
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @poems and quotation from poetry
